asserts: complete labeled statement inventory of the frontiers draft
heuristic triage classes for campaign steering
oracle sample of fixed labels is consistent
does_not_assert: human-perfect classification of every conditional nuance
that FRESH items are un-audited in the community outside this map

generator_routes.classify: keyword/heuristic on statement body + proof presence

honest_headline: Inventory of 213 labeled statements in 5940 lines; status mix={'CONDITIONAL': 65, 'PROVED-IN-PAPER': 88, 'DEFINITIONAL': 56, 'OPEN': 3, 'CITED': 1}; classifications are parser heuristics for campaign triage, not final referee judgments. Complement to holmbuar #494 (curated 33-instance audit): this map is exhaustive inventory.
